REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (242 Winding Way)
Off Calendar Jan-07-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ernest Der for and with Debra Dolch (Petitioner).

Romeo Aurelio, Agent for bidders Burchbinder and Pearson stated that the cashier's check is en route, that the ETA is about 30 minutes. The Court agreed to proceed with the bidding on the condition that the cashier's check arriving in reasonable time. The bid was increased to $655,280.00 to Romeo Aurelio, Agent for Burchbinder and Pearson based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to receipt of the order). An additional bond in the amount of $362,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)
